sections.heading: What is Environment Variables & Config?
sections.body: Manage secrets, configs for dev/staging/production, and .env files. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Environment Variables & Config is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Environment Variables & Config is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Environment Variables & Config every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Environment Variables & Config implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Environment Variables & Config is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: Environment Variables & Config is a core concept in devops. Manage secrets, configs for dev/staging/production, and .env files. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
